title: Lawyer Referral Services - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Legal & Public Safety > Lawyer Referral Services 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adolescents Veteran/Military Personnel Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE BAR LAWYER REFERRAL SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referrals to participating lawyers who offer the first in-office consultation at a reduced consultation fee when accessed through the Lawyer Referral Service. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Age 17 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BAR MODEST MEANS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Matches moderate-income households with attorneys willing to work for reduced fees. Modest Means attorneys handle only family law, criminal defense, foreclosure, and landlord/tenant matters. There are a limited number of Modest Means attorneys, and they are not available in all areas of Oregon. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Eligibility depends on the type of legal matter, client income and assets, and availability of participating lawyers. The program is intended to help those who earn too much to qualify for legal aid, but who cannot afford traditional legal fees. Legal matter must be in Oregon and both parties must live in Oregon. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BAR MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Administers a referral panel that lists lawyers willing to provide volunteer legal assistance (pro bono) primarily related to the Servicemembers' Civil Relief Act (SCRA), which provides additional legal protection to persons entering or called to active duty in the US Armed Forces. Many volunteer lawyers also assist with family law, consumer/credit law, real property/landlord-tenant law, and estate planning issues. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Active military personnel and their dependents in need of legal help, immediately before, during, and after deployment Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BAR YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lawyers volunteer as Problem Solvers to offer legal information and advice to children and youth through a 30-minute consultation. This service is not available in all areas. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE BAR LAWYER REFERRAL SERVICE
